title: IT Operations and Business Analyst
description:
IT Operation & Business analyst - Work Location: Changi

Role Overview

We are seeking an IT-savvy professional to support the day-to-day operations and continuous improvement of existing digital systems. This role involves managing assigned workstreams, working directly with stakeholders and vendors, and delivering small to medium initiatives end-to-end.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support day-to-day operations of enterprise digital and IT systems, including issue tracking, follow-ups, and resolution.

  • Manage assigned projects and change requests from requirements through delivery, including tracking timelines, actions, and dependencies.

  • Engage business users to gather and document functional requirements and translate them into clear specifications for IT teams or external vendors.

  • Coordinate with external vendors across the delivery lifecycle, including development, user acceptance testing (UAT), deployment, issue resolution, and escalation.

  • Support UAT planning and execution and coordinate rollout activities.

  • Maintain project documentation, meeting notes, status updates, and reports.

  • Support procurement activities, including quotations, vendor coordination, and contract administration.

  • Organise and support project meetings, training sessions, and workshops, including preparation of presentation materials where required.

  • Provide after-hours system support when required, based on operational needs.

Requirements

  • Diploma or degree in Information Systems, Business IT, or a related discipline.

  • Experience in IT business analysis, IT operations, or digital project delivery.

  • Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.

  • Experience working with CRM or enterprise digital platforms; Salesforce experience is an advantage.

  • Ability to work effectively with business users, internal teams, and external vendors.

  • Strong communication, organisational, and follow-through skills.

    Next Step

    • Simply click on 'Apply here' or email to tamanna.bilandi@adecco.com to drop your resume.
    • All shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

    Tamanna Bilandi

    EA Licence No. 91C2918

    Personnel Registration No. R2096241

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
